hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python -m py_compile "$file" 2>&1 && echo "[syntax-check] ✅ $file" || echo "[syntax-check] ❌ Syntax error in $file"; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/limon/Desktop/OS_Instructor && npx tsc --noEmit --project frontend/tsconfig.app.json 2>&1 | head -20 || echo "[ts-check] ❌ TypeScript errors found"; fi
